An [[Unidentified Outer Rim cyberneticist|cyberneticist]] worked at a '''cyborg science center''' in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] where he performed medical experiments and operations. It was here that he, with the assistance of [[Nubyl]], created specialized armor for [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] and [[Jaing]]. The building was damaged when [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] under the command of [[Ung Kusp]] raided it to steal a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Emperor's cane|artifact]].
